label: frontier • read a file before editing it (read -> edit ordering)
query: The function in greeting.py returns a typo'd message. Read the file first to see the exact current text, then make a surgical edit so it returns the string "Hello, world!" exactly. Do not rewrite the whole file.
notes: Read-before-edit discipline pinned via mustCallToolsInOrder [file_read, file_edit]: a grounded surgical edit needs the current bytes first (file_edit's old_string must match what is on disk), so a model that blind-edits without reading fails the ordering. mustNotCallTools forbids the file_write clobber path; the file assertion locks the outcome.
